content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-009)

## Closest-to-completion (prioritize)

- **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (L2427) + `sectionsMul_mul_comm` (L2443)** — the only 2 SNAP sorries left,
  no longer mathematically open. Both reduce (already, via `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]`) to the
  iso-level associativity/commutativity constraint of `tensorPowAdd`. The full close recipe was
  demonstrated this iter on `tensorPowAdd_zero_right` (see the PROJECT_STATUS proof pattern). Plan:
  1. Prove (or extract) the **iso-level `tensorPowAdd` pentagon** off `MonoidalCategory.pentagon` and
     **hexagon** off `MonoidalCategory.hexagon_forward` on the now-canonical `X.Modules` structure,
     using `tensorObjAssoc` (canonical `α_`), `tensorBraiding_eq`, and the two whisker bridges to turn
     every hand-built constituent into a canonical map flanked by `tensorObjIso` bridges.
  2. Apply `Γ(X,-) = .val.app (op ⊤)` + `η`-naturality (pattern of the already-green
     `tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`) to descend to the section-level statement.
  3. Use the two-pass `simp only` (syntactic, then DEFEQ-matching with `Iso.cancel_iso_inv_left`) to
     cancel the bridge pairs across the `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` diamond.
  These are mechanical assembly behind ONE new iso-level coherence lemma each — comparable scope to
  this iter's `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`. Strong candidate to take SNAP 2 → 0.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (now in PROJECT_STATUS KB)

- **Canonical iso-coherence close recipe** (the `tensorPowAdd_zero_right` succ pattern): bridge-rewrite
  → `Iso.ext` → syntactic `simp only` → DEFEQ `simp only` (cancels diamond bridge pairs) →
  `canonical_runit_core_assoc` → `rightUnitor_naturality` finish. Reuse verbatim shape for assoc/comm.
- **`canonical_runit_core`**: prove a canonical monoidal identity on the `𝟙_`-form (so
  `braiding_leftUnitor`/triangle fire syntactically), then transfer to the `unitModule X`-form by
  defeq via `exact`. The next prover will likely want an analogous `canonical_*_core` for pentagon/
  hexagon.

## Coverage debt — blueprint these (planner, not review)

`archon dag-query unmatched` lean_aux nodes with no blueprint block (SectionGradedRing.lean):
- **`canonical_runit_core`** (NEW this iter, L2304) — canonical right-unit/braiding core
  `α ≫ (a◁β) ≫ α⁻¹ ≫ (ρ▷m) = ρ_(a⊗m)`; depends on `braiding_leftUnitor` + triangle. Needs a small
  lemma block (e.g. under the SGR canonical-coherence subsection).
- **`tensorPowAdd_zero_right`** (carry-over debt since iter-006, now CLOSED, L2320) — the right-unit
  coherence `μ_{n,0} = ρ` of `tensorPowAdd`; depends on the whisker bridges + `canonical_runit_core`.
- Pre-existing untracked lean_aux helpers also flagged (lower priority, mostly iter-005/006 carriers):
  `W_domWhisker`, `W_tripWhisker`, `actL_domWhisker`, `actR_domWhisker`, `domWhisker`,
  `proj_domWhisker`, `tripWhisker`, `tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso`/`tensorObjWhiskerRightIso` (the def
  nodes — the `_eq` lemmas ARE covered), `tensorObjRightUnitor_hom_sectionsMul`,
  `tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`. ~328 unmatched total, the bulk inherited parent `Grassmannian.*`
  extraction artifacts (out-of-cone, resolve at merge).

## MEDIUM — code hygiene (next prover or a cleanup pass)

- ~4 stale historical planning-comment blocks (~200 lines) in SectionGradedRing.lean describe the
  abandoned hand-rolled route; their referenced proofs are now complete (lean-auditor). Primary source
  of the 15+ long-line linter warnings. Pruning is a `.lean` edit (out of review scope); flag for the
  next prover/refactor touching the file. Stale comment at L2398 inside `sectionsMul_mul_one` likewise.
- `@[instance_reducible]` is a deprecated alias for `@[implicit_reducible]` — cosmetic; can normalize
  when next editing the file.

## Do NOT re-do

- Do NOT re-probe the `tensorObjAssoc` non-canonicity question — RESOLVED (canonical `α_` since
  iter-008; this iter's close confirms pentagon/triangle inherit cleanly).
- Do NOT re-run a `mathlib-analogist` on the associator shape — the ALIGN pivot is complete and paying
  off.
- χ leg (`QuotScheme.lean`, 4 sorries) stays DEFERRED — χ-semantic, needs the cohomology engine this
  i=0 leg lacks. Do NOT assign.

## Blueprint doctor (deferred chapters, resolve at merge — do NOT edit)

`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` (2 phantom `% archon:covers` + 13 broken `\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`
(4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`), `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13 broken `\cref`) — all out-of-cone extraction
artifacts. Active SGR chapter clean.
